description_long: This handbag features a rectangular body with a striking geometric patterned fabric panel in shades of red, beige, and black, bordered by a deep red synthetic or leather-like material. The front and back panels are adorned with the same intricate woven pattern, giving the bag a bold and stylish appearance. A single, wide strap runs vertically along one side, attached at the top and bottom, suggesting a shoulder or crossbody carrying style. The top edge is fitted with a zipper closure, providing secure access to the main compartment. The side views reveal a slim, tapered profile, indicating a compact yet functional design. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean stitching and a modern, urban aesthetic.
description: A rectangular handbag with a red border and geometric patterned fabric panels, featuring a wide vertical strap and a top zipper closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the geometric patterned panel bordered by red material and a wide vertical strap on the left.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim, tapered profile and the attachment of the wide strap.
description_view_2: Back view with the same geometric patterned panel and the wide strap now on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the slim profile and the zipper pull at the top.
attribute_strap_type: Single wide shoulder or crossbody strap, non-adjustable, attached vertically at both ends.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure located along the top edge of the bag.
attribute_pattern: Geometric pattern in red, beige, and black on the main panels.
